case_title: BROMAN ENTERPRISES LLC RESPONDENT VS. JULIANNE WURM APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT WURM, JULIANNE AS TO RESPONDENT BROMAN ENTERPRISES LLC HEARING SET FOR JAN-08-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINUTES FOR JAN-08-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
DEPT. 525, JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD GROTCH, CLERK I. HAMMER & PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED - COURT TO MAIL JUDGMENT REFLECTING SETTLEMENT TO PARTIES.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROMAN ENTERPRISES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WURM, JULIANNE $4,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,200.00, EACH PARTY TO BEAR HER OR ITS OWN COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
